title: Recalculate normals (consistent outside)
when_to_use: Mesh chiusa con normali tutte invertite (analyze_mesh_for_print reports normals='all_inverted'). Triggered da R002.

steps.label: Select target and enter edit mode
steps.code:
import bpy
for o in bpy.context.selected_objects:
    o.select_set(False)
obj = bpy.data.objects['{object_name}']
obj.select_set(True)
bpy.context.view_layer.objects.active = obj
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
bpy.ops.mesh.select_all(action='SELECT')

verification.notes: After recalc, signed_volume_mm3 must be positive (outside-facing normals).
